detail.description:
Doomsday is here! Quit sunbathing—the Zombie Kings are calling you out by name!
Welcome to the Last Line of Defense! In this garden, acting cute won’t save you. This is a story of plant-based vengeance. Grab your weapons, command your botanical legion, and defend your home!

Game Features:
【Big Guy Incoming! Shoot It Down!】
Facing a surging tide of undead? Don't flinch—hold the line! See that jerk leading the pack? Open fire! Turn those Walking Dead into the most colorful fertilizer this garden
